name: Crab Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove all cartilage from crab meat.
2. In a bowl, beat the egg; add milk; stir in biscuit mix.
3. Add seasonings and crab meat, mixing gently.
4. Heat 2 to 3 inches of fat or oil in a heavy skillet to 375 degrees.
5. Drop batter into hot oil by the half teaspoon and fry until brown.
6. Makes about 24 fritters.
